translation: Monks, this samsara is without discoverable beginning. A first point is not discerned of beings hindered by ignorance and fettered by craving, who run on and wander. Suppose, monks, a man were to cut down whatever grass, wood, branches, and foliage there is in this India, and having gathered it together, he would make it into four-inch pegs and lay them down, saying: 'This is my mother, and this is my mother's mother.' The mothers and grandmothers of that man would not be exhausted, monks, before the grass, wood, branches, and foliage in this India went to exhaustion and depletion. For what reason? Monks, this samsara is without discoverable beginning. A first point is not discerned of beings hindered by ignorance and fettered by craving, who run on and wander. For such a long time, monks, have you experienced suffering, experienced pain, experienced disaster, and swollen the cemetery. Thus, monks, it is indeed enough to become weary of all conditioned things, enough to become dispassionate, enough to be released from them.
literal_translation: Incalculable-beginning-this monks, round-of-rebirths. First end not is-discerned of-ignorance-hindered beings of-craving-fettered running-on wandering. Just-as, monks, a man whatever in-this Rose-apple-Continent grass-wood-branch-foliage that cutting having-gathered-together four-inch four-inch pegs having-made should-lay-down, this my mother, of-her to-me this mother-thus, unexhausted-indeed, monks, of-that man mother-mothers would-be, then in-this Rose-apple-Continent grass-wood-branch-foliage exhaustion depletion would-go. That what-for reason? Incalculable-beginning-this, monks, round-of-rebirths. First end not is-discerned of-ignorance-hindered beings of-craving-fettered running-on wandering. Thus long-night to-you, monks, suffering was-experienced, intensity was-experienced, disaster was-experienced, cemetery was-increased. Long-enough-and-this, monks, enough-indeed in-all-formations to-become-weary, enough to-become-dispassionate, enough to-be-released-thus. First.

data.meaning_combo: this which is without discoverable beginning
data.example_1: anamataggo'yaṃ bhikkhave, saṃsāro. pubbā koṭi na paññāyati avijjānīvaraṇānaṃ sattānaṃ taṇhāsaṃyojanānaṃ sandhāvataṃ saṃsarataṃ.

components.example_1: anamataggo'yaṃ, bhikkhave, saṃsāro. pubbā koṭi nappaññāyati sattippahārānaṃ asippahārānaṃ usuppahārānaṃ pharasuppahārānaṃ
components.example_2: saddhassa hi, bhante, ariyasāvakassa āraddhavīriyassa upaṭṭhitassatino samāhitacittassa etaṃ pāṭikaṅkhaṃ yaṃ evaṃ pajānissati, anamataggo kho saṃsāro.

components.example_1:
samuddo udadhinaṃ seṭṭho,
nakkhattānañ'ca candimā,
sadevakassa lokassa,
buddho aggo pavuccatī'ti.
components.example_2: evam'eva kho, bhikkhave, yv'āyaṃ jhāyī samādhismiṃ samādhikusalo ca hoti samādhismiṃ samāpattikusalo ca ayaṃ imesaṃ catunnaṃ jhāyīnaṃ aggo ca seṭṭho ca mokkho ca uttamo ca pavaro cā'ti.

components.example_1: ambil'aggehi'pi, tittak'aggehi'pi, kaṭuk'aggehi'pi, madhur'aggehi'pi, khārikehi'pi, akhārikehi'pi, loṇikehi'pi, aloṇikehi'pi.

kodhaṃ jhatvā sukhaṃ seti,
kodhaṃ jhatvā na socati,
kodhassa visamūlassa,
madhur'aggassa devate,
vadhaṃ ariyā pasaṃsanti,
tañ'hi jhatvā na socatī'ti.
components.example_2: pañc'imāni, bhikkhave, bījajātāni. katamāni pañca? mūlabījaṃ, khandhabījaṃ, aggabījaṃ, phalubījaṃ, bījabījaññ'eva pañcamaṃ.

components.example_1: appamattikā esā, bhikkhave, vuddhi yadidaṃ bhogavuddhi. etadaggaṃ, bhikkhave, vuddhīnaṃ yadidaṃ paññāvuddhi. tasmā't'iha, bhikkhave, evaṃ sikkhitabbaṃ, paññāvuddhiyā vaddhissāmā'ti.
components.example_2: tena kho pana samayena pañcannaṃ rājūnaṃ pasenadipamukhānaṃ pañcahi kāmaguṇehi samappitānaṃ samaṅgībhūtānaṃ paricārayamānānaṃ ayam'antarākathā udapādi, kiṃ nu kho kāmānaṃ aggan'ti?

components.example_1:

kodhaṃ chetvā na socati,
kodhassa visamūlassa,
madhur'aggassa devate,
vadhaṃ ariyā pasaṃsanti,
tañ'hi chetvā na socatī'ti.
so āsanāni paṭisāmeti, pānīyaṃ paribhojanīyaṃ paṭisāmeti, avakkārapātiṃ paṭisāmeti, bhatt'aggaṃ sammajjati
components.example_2: imasmiṃ uposath'agge sannipatitānaṃ bhikkhūnaṃ gaṇanā kittakā bhikkhū honti?

components.example_1: anayabyasanan'ti ettha na ayo'ti anayo, avaḍḍhiyā etaṃ nāmaṃ. hitañ'ca sukhañ'ca viyassati vikkhipatī'ti byasanaṃ, ñātipārijuññ'ādīnaṃ etaṃ nāmaṃ.

data.meaning_1: monk; monastic; mendicant; fully ordained monk
data.example_1:
kāmesu n'ābhigijjheyya,
manas'ānāvilo siyā,
kusalo sabbadhammānaṃ,
sato bhikkhu paribbaje'ti.
data.example_2: idam'avoca bhagavā. attamanā te bhikkhū bhagavato bhāsitaṃ abhinandun'ti.

data.meaning_1: wandering on; moving on continuously; transmigration; passing from one state of existence to another; stream of existence; cyclic existence
data.example_1:
anekajātisaṃsāraṃ,
sandhāvissaṃ anibbisaṃ,
gahakārakaṃ gavesanto,
dukkhā jāti punappunaṃ.
data.example_2:
te yogayuttā mārassa,
ayogakkhemino janā,
sattā gacchanti saṃsāraṃ,
jātimaraṇagāmino.

data.meaning_combo: going back and forth; lit. flowing together

data.example_2:

data.example_1:
koṭisatānaṃ navutīnaṃ,
asītiyā'pi ca koṭinaṃ,
ete āsuṃ tayo ṭhānā,
vimalānaṃ samāgame.
data.example_2:
ev'āhaṃ cintayitvāna,
n'ekakoṭisataṃ dhanaṃ,
nāth'ānāthānaṃ datvāna,
himavantam'upāgamiṃ.

data.example_1: anamataggo'yaṃ, bhikkhave, saṃsāro. pubbā koṭi nappaññāyati sattippahārānaṃ asippahārānaṃ usuppahārānaṃ pharasuppahārānaṃ
data.example_2: caṅkamassa anto vā majjhe vā koṭiyaṃ vā rukkhe sati pamādam'āgamma caṅkamantassa nalāṭaṃ vā sīsaṃ vā paṭihaññatī'ti antorukkhatā dutiyo doso.

data.example_1: anamataggo'yaṃ, bhikkhave, saṃsāro. pubbā koṭi nappaññāyati sattippahārānaṃ asippahārānaṃ usuppahārānaṃ pharasuppahārānaṃ
data.example_2: caṅkamassa anto vā majjhe vā koṭiyaṃ vā rukkhe sati pamādam'āgamma caṅkamantassa nalāṭaṃ vā sīsaṃ vā paṭihaññatī'ti antorukkhatā dutiyo doso.

data.example_1: taṃ kiṃ maññasi, ānanda, katamaṃ nu kho dukkarataraṃ vā durabhisambhavataraṃ vā, yo dūrato'va sukhumena tāḷacchiggaḷena asanaṃ atipāteyya poṅkh'ānupoṅkhaṃ avirādhitaṃ, yo vā sattadhā bhinnassa vālassa koṭiyā koṭiṃ paṭivijjheyyā'ti?

taṃ kiṃ maññasi, ānanda, katamaṃ nu kho dukkarataraṃ vā durabhisambhavataraṃ vā, yo dūrato'va sukhumena tāḷacchiggaḷena asanaṃ atipāteyya poṅkh'ānupoṅkhaṃ avirādhitaṃ, yo vā sattadhā bhinnassa vālassa koṭiyā koṭiṃ paṭivijjheyyā'ti?

na antalikkhe na samuddamajjhe,
na pabbatānaṃ vivaraṃ pavissa,
na vijjati so jagatippadeso,
yatthaṭṭhito mucceyya pāpakammā.
data.example_2:
kassako paṭijānāsi,
na ca passāma te kasiṃ,
kasiṃ no pucchito brūhi,
yathā jānemu te kasiṃ.

data.meaning_1: (adds a question mark) surely?; does one not?
data.meaning_combo: (adds a question mark) surely?; does one not?
data.example_1: yo so, sāriputta, ariyasāvako tathāgate ek'antagato abhippasanno, na so tathāgate vā tathāgatasāsane vā kaṅkheyya vā vicikiccheyya vā'ti?

data.meaning_1: is clearly known; is evident; is perceived; there is
data.example_1: tīṇ'imāni, bhikkhave, saṅkhatassa saṅkhatalakkhaṇāni. katamāni tīṇi? uppādo paññāyati, vayo paññāyati, ṭhitassa aññathattaṃ paññāyati. imāni kho, bhikkhave, tīṇi saṅkhatassa saṅkhatalakkhaṇānī'ti.
data.example_2: yo, bhikkhave, evaṃ vadeyya, yathā yath'āyaṃ puriso kammaṃ karoti tathā tathā taṃ paṭisaṃvediyatī'ti, evaṃ santaṃ, bhikkhave, brahmacariyavāso na hoti, okāso na paññāyati sammā dukkhassa antakiriyāya.

data.meaning_1: is allowed; is permitted (to); is known
data.meaning_combo: is allowed; is permitted (to); is known; lit. is actively known
data.example_1: maraṇamattañ'h'etaṃ, bhikkhave, dukkhaṃ yadidaṃ aññataraṃ saṃkiliṭṭhaṃ āpattiṃ āpajjati. yathārūpāya āpattiyā vuṭṭhānaṃ paññāyati.
data.example_2: dhammatā esā, bhikkhave, diṭṭhisampannassa puggalassa, kiñ'c'āpi tathārūpiṃ āpattiṃ āpajjati, yathārūpāya āpattiyā vuṭṭhānaṃ paññāyati, atha kho naṃ khippam'eva satthari vā viññūsu vā sabrahmacārīsu deseti vivarati uttānīkaroti, desetvā vivaritvā uttānīkatvā āyatiṃ saṃvaraṃ āpajjati.

data.meaning_combo: is well known; is recognized (by); lit. is actively known
data.example_1: paññāyissasi kho tvaṃ, moghapurisa, etena sakena pāpakena diṭṭhigatena. idh'āhaṃ bhikkhū paṭipucchissāmī'ti.
data.example_2: tassa mayhaṃ, bhante, etadahosi, alaṃ dāni me aḍḍakaraṇena, bhadramukho dāni aḍḍakaraṇena paññāyissatī'ti.

data.meaning_combo: happens (to); occurs (to); exists (for); lit. is actively known
data.example_1: tatra sudaṃ, bhikkhave, vipassī kumāro antepuraṃ gato dukkhī dummano pajjhāyati, dhi'r'atthu kira, bho, jāti nāma, yatra hi nāma jātassa jarā paññāyissatī'ti!

data.meaning_1: impeded by ignorance; obstructed by not understanding
data.meaning_combo: impeded by ignorance; obstructed by not understanding
data.example_1: iti kho, ānanda, kammaṃ khettaṃ, viññāṇaṃ bījaṃ, taṇhā sneho. avijjānīvaraṇānaṃ sattānaṃ taṇhāsaṃyojanānaṃ hīnāya dhātuyā viññāṇaṃ patiṭṭhitaṃ evaṃ āyatiṃ punabbhav'ābhinibbatti hoti.
data.example_2: pubbā koṭi na paññāyati avijjānīvaraṇānaṃ sattānaṃ taṇhāsaṃyojanānaṃ sandhāvataṃ saṃsarataṃ.

components.meaning_1: ignorance; illusion; not knowing; not understanding
components.meaning_combo: ignorance; illusion; not knowing; not understanding
components.example_1: rūparāgo, arūparāgo, māno, uddhaccaṃ, avijjā, imāni pañc'uddham'bhāgiyāni saṃyojanāni.
components.example_2:
avijjāya nivuto loko,
vevicchā pamādā nappakāsati,
japp'ābhilepanaṃ brūmi,
dukkham'assa mahabbhayaṃ.

data.example_1:
anicce niccasaññino,
dukkhe ca sukhasaññino,
anattani ca attā'ti,
asubhe subhasaññino,
micchādiṭṭhihatā sattā,
khittacittā visaññino.
data.example_2: evam'eva kho, bhikkhave, appakā te sattā ye manussesu paccājāyanti. atha kho ete'y'eva bahutarā sattā ye aññatra manussehi paccājāyanti.

data.example_1:
hitvā icchañ'ca lobhañ'ca,
yattha satto puthujjano,
cakkhumā paṭipajjeyya,
tareyya narakaṃ imaṃ.
data.example_2:
satto guhāyaṃ bahun'ābhichanno,
tiṭṭhaṃ naro mohanasmiṃ pagāḷho,
dūre vivekā hi tathāvidho so,
kāmā hi loke na hi suppahāyā.

data.example_1:
akkhambhiyo hoti agāram'āvasaṃ,
par'ābhibhū sattubhi nappamaddano,
manussabhūten'idha hoti kenaci,
akkhambhiyo tassa phalena kammuno.
data.example_2:
idaṃ kho'haṃ tadāvocaṃ,
gahitā tena sattunā,
na me idaṃ tathā dukkhaṃ,
yaṃ maṃ khādeyya rakkhaso,
yañ'ca me ayyaputtassa,
mano hessati aññathā.

data.meaning_1: with craving as fetter; having desire as a bond
data.meaning_combo: with craving as fetter; having desire as a bond
data.example_1: iti kho, ānanda, kammaṃ khettaṃ, viññāṇaṃ bījaṃ, taṇhā sneho. avijjānīvaraṇānaṃ sattānaṃ taṇhāsaṃyojanānaṃ hīnāya dhātuyā viññāṇaṃ patiṭṭhitaṃ evaṃ āyatiṃ punabbhav'ābhinibbatti hoti.
data.example_2: pubbā koṭi na paññāyati avijjānīvaraṇānaṃ sattānaṃ taṇhāsaṃyojanānaṃ sandhāvataṃ saṃsarataṃ.

components.meaning_combo: with craving; having desire (for); lit. with thirst
components.example_1:
rājā ca aññe ca bahū manussā,
avītataṇhā maraṇaṃ upenti,
ūnā'va hutvāna jahanti dehaṃ,
kāmehi lokamhi na h'atthi titti.
components.example_2:
passāmi loke pariphandamānaṃ,
pajaṃ imaṃ taṇhagataṃ bhavesu,
hīnā narā maccumukhe lapanti,
avītataṇhāse bhav'ābhavesu.

components.example_1:
nandisaṃyojano loko,
vitakkassa vicāraṇaṃ,
taṇhāya vippahānena,
nibbānaṃ iti vuccati.
components.example_2: evaṃ vutte aññataro bhikkhu there bhikkhū etadavoca, phasso kho, āvuso, eko anto, phassasamudayo dutiyo anto, phassanirodho majjhe, taṇhā sibbinī.

components.example_1: bālo puttataṇhāya c'eva dhanataṇhāya ca haññati vihaññati dukkhayati

components.meaning_1: name of one of the three daughters of Death
components.meaning_combo: name of one of the three daughters of Death; lit. thirst
components.example_1:
disvāna taṇhaṃ aratiṃ ragañ'ca,
n'āhosi chando api methunasmiṃ,
kim'ev'idaṃ muttakarīsapuṇṇaṃ,
pādā'pi naṃ samphusituṃ na icche.
components.example_2: atha kho taṇhā ca arati ca ragā ca māradhītaro yena māro pāpimā ten'upasaṅkamiṃsu.

components.example_1:
ito ahaṃ vassasatāni pañca,
yaṃ evarūpā vicarāmi naggā,
khudāya taṇhāya ca khajjamānā,
pāpassa kammassa phalaṃ mam'edaṃ.

components.meaning_1: fetter; chain; bond; thing which binds
components.meaning_combo: fetter; chain; bond; thing which binds; lit. causing to yoke together
components.example_1:
appamādarato bhikkhu,

rājā ca aññe ca bahū manussā,
avītataṇhā maraṇaṃ upenti,
ūnā'va hutvāna jahanti dehaṃ,
kāmehi lokamhi na h'atthi titti.
components.example_2:
passāmi loke pariphandamānaṃ,
pajaṃ imaṃ taṇhagataṃ bhavesu,
hīnā narā maccumukhe lapanti,
avītataṇhāse bhav'ābhavesu.

components.example_1:
nandisaṃyojano loko,
vitakkassa vicāraṇaṃ,
taṇhāya vippahānena,
nibbānaṃ iti vuccati.
components.example_2: evaṃ vutte aññataro bhikkhu there bhikkhū etadavoca, phasso kho, āvuso, eko anto, phassasamudayo dutiyo anto, phassanirodho majjhe, taṇhā sibbinī.

components.meaning_1: name of one of the three daughters of Death
components.meaning_combo: name of one of the three daughters of Death; lit. thirst
components.example_1:
disvāna taṇhaṃ aratiṃ ragañ'ca,
n'āhosi chando api methunasmiṃ,
kim'ev'idaṃ muttakarīsapuṇṇaṃ,
pādā'pi naṃ samphusituṃ na icche.
components.example_2: atha kho taṇhā ca arati ca ragā ca māradhītaro yena māro pāpimā ten'upasaṅkamiṃsu.

components.meaning_1: fetter; chain; bond; thing which binds
components.meaning_combo: fetter; chain; bond; thing which binds; lit. causing to yoke together
components.example_1:
appamādarato bhikkhu,
pamāde bhayadassi vā,
saṃyojanaṃ aṇuṃ thūlaṃ,
ḍahaṃ aggī'va gacchati.
components.example_2: evam'eva kho, bhikkhave, bhāvan'ānuyogaṃ anuyuttassa bhikkhuno viharato appakasiren'eva saṃyojanāni paṭippassambhanti pūtikāni bhavantī'ti.

components.meaning_combo: connection; link; lit. causing to yoke together
components.example_1: seyyathā'pi, sunakkhatta, paṇḍupalāso bandhanā pavutto abhabbo haritattāya. evam'eva kho, sunakkhatta, āneñj'ādhimuttassa purisapuggalassa ye lok'āmisasaṃyojane se pavutte.

components.meaning_1: with a fetter; having a chain; about a bond; regarding a thing which binds
components.meaning_combo: with a fetter; having a chain; about a bond; regarding a thing which binds; lit. causing to yoke together
components.example_1: kittāvatā pana, bho gotama, bhikkhu arahaṃ hoti khīṇ'āsavo vusitavā katakaraṇīyo ohitabhāro anuppattasadattho parikkhīṇabhavasaṃyojano samma'd'aññā vimutto'ti?

data.meaning_1: fetter that is craving; bond of desire
data.meaning_combo: fetter that is craving; bond of desire
data.example_1: n'āhaṃ, bhikkhave, aññaṃ ekasaṃyojanam'pi samanupassāmi yena saṃyojanena saṃyuttā sattā dīgharattaṃ sandhāvanti saṃsaranti yatha'y'idaṃ, bhikkhave, taṇhāsaṃyojanaṃ.

data.compound_construction: tiṇa ca kaṭṭha ca sākhā ca palāsa ca
data.example_1: seyyathā'pi, bhikkhave, puriso yaṃ imasmiṃ jambudīpe tiṇakaṭṭhasākhāpalāsaṃ tacchetvā ekajjhaṃ saṃhareyya, ekajjhaṃ saṃharitvā sūlaṃ kareyya
data.example_2: yaṃnūn'āhaṃ tiṇakaṭṭhasākhāpalāsaṃ saṃkaḍḍhitvā, kullaṃ bandhitvā, taṃ kullaṃ nissāya hatthehi ca pādehi ca vāyamamāno sotthinā pāraṃ uttareyyan'ti.

components.example_1: tassā evam'assa, yaṃnūn'āhaṃ agatapubbañ'c'eva disaṃ gaccheyyaṃ, akhāditapubbāni ca tiṇāni khādeyyaṃ, apītapubbāni ca pānīyāni piveyyan'ti.
components.example_2: so tattha allāni c'eva tiṇāni pakkhipeyya, allāni ca gomayāni pakkhipeyya, allāni ca kaṭṭhāni pakkhipeyya, udakavātañ'ca dadeyya, paṃsukena ca okireyya.

components.example_1:
tiṇadosāni khettāni,
rāgadosā ayaṃ pajā,
tasmā hi vītarāgesu,
dinnaṃ hoti mahapphalaṃ.
evaṃ vutte, mahārāja, te bhikkhū maṃ etadavocuṃ, n'atthi kho, bhante, ghaṭikārassa kumbhakārassa nivesane tiṇaṃ, atthi ca khv'āssa āvesane tiṇacchadanan'ti.

kadā nu kaṭṭhe ca tiṇe latā ca,
khandhe ime'haṃ amite ca dhamme,
ajjhattikān'eva ca bāhirāni ca,
samaṃ tuleyyaṃ tadidaṃ kadā me.
components.example_2: yadā kho, āvuso, imaṃ kāyaṃ tayo dhammā jahanti, āyu usmā ca viññāṇaṃ, ath'āyaṃ kāyo ujjhito avakkhitto seti, yathā kaṭṭhaṃ acetanan'ti.

components.meaning_combo: ploughed; tilled; farmed; cultivated; lit. dragged
components.example_1:
evamesā kasī kaṭṭhā,
sā hoti amatapphalā,
etaṃ kasiṃ kasitvāna,
sabbadukkhā pamuccatī'ti.
seyyathā'pi bhikkhave makkaṭo araññe pavane caramāno sākhaṃ gaṇhati taṃ muñcitvā aññaṃ gaṇhati taṃ muñcitvā aññaṃ gaṇhati
components.example_2:
purimaṃ pahāya aparaṃ sitāse,
ej'ānugā te na taranti saṅgaṃ,
te uggahāyanti nirassajanti,
kapī'va sākhaṃ pamuñcaṃ gahāyaṃ.

components.example_1: pabbatakandarapadarasākhāparipūrā kusobbhe paripūrenti, kusobbhā paripūrā mahāsobbhe paripūrenti, mahāsobbhā paripūrā, kunnadiyo paripūrenti, kunnadiyo paripūrā mahānadiyo paripūrenti, mahānadiyo paripūrā mahāsamuddaṃ paripūrenti
components.example_2: seyyathā'pi, bhikkhave, uparipabbate thullaphusitake deve vassante taṃ udakaṃ yathāninnaṃ pavattamānaṃ pabbatakandarapadarasākhā paripūreti.

components.example_1:
tagarañ'ca palāsena,
yo naro upanayhati,
pattā'pi surabhi vāyanti,
evaṃ dhīr'ūpasevanā.
components.example_2: seyyathā'pi, sunakkhatta, paṇḍupalāso bandhanā pavutto abhabbo haritattāya, evam'eva kho, sunakkhatta, āneñj'ādhimuttassa purisapuggalassa ye lok'āmisasaṃyojane se pavutte.

components.example_1: evaṃ me sutaṃ, ekaṃ samayaṃ bhagavā kosalesu viharati naḷakapāne palāsavane.
makkhassa ca pahānāya palāsassa ca pahānāya, atthi majjhimā paṭipadā cakkhukaraṇī ñāṇakaraṇī upasamāya abhiññāya sambodhāya nibbānāya saṃvattati
components.example_2: upanāhassa samitattā santo, makkhassa samitattā santo, palāsassa samitattā santo

data.example_1: ekam'antaṃ nisinnā kho tā bhikkhuniyo āyasmantaṃ ānandaṃ etadavocuṃ
data.example_2: idha cunda ekacco anabhijjhālu hoti. yaṃ taṃ parassa paravitt'ūpakaraṇaṃ taṃ anabhijjhitā hoti, aho vata yaṃ parassa taṃ mamassā'ti

data.example_1: ekam'antaṃ nisinnā kho tā bhikkhuniyo āyasmantaṃ ānandaṃ etadavocuṃ
data.example_2: idha cunda ekacco anabhijjhālu hoti. yaṃ taṃ parassa paravitt'ūpakaraṇaṃ taṃ anabhijjhitā hoti, aho vata yaṃ parassa taṃ mamassā'ti

data.example_1: samaṇā samaṇā'ti vo, bhikkhave, jano sañjānāti. tumhe ca pana, ke tumhe'ti puṭṭhā samānā, samaṇ'āmhā'ti paṭijānātha.
data.example_2: tato tvaṃ bāhiya na tena. yato tvaṃ bāhiya na tena tato tvaṃ bāhiya na tattha. yato tvaṃ bāhiya na tattha tato tvaṃ bāhiya n'ev'idha na huraṃ na ubhayam'antarena

data.example_1: yato kho tvaṃ anuruddha ime aṭṭha mahāpurisavitakke vitakkessasi, tato tvaṃ anuruddha yāva'd'eva ākaṅkhissasi…
data.example_2: tam'enaṃ mitt'āmaccā ñātisālohitā jātam'eva naṃ saṅghāṭikaṃ kareyyuṃ, saṅghāṭikattam'eva samādapeyyuṃ, ehi tvaṃ, bhadramukha, saṅghāṭiko hohi, saṅghāṭikassa te sato saṅghāṭidhāraṇamattena abhijjhālussa abhijjhā pahīyissati

data.meaning_1: having cut off; having severed; (comm) having killed
data.example_1:
vanaṃ chindatha mā rukkhaṃ,
vanato jāyate bhayaṃ,
chetvā vanañ'ca vanathañ'ca,
nibbanā hotha bhikkhavo.
data.example_2:
kiṃsu chetvā sukhaṃ seti,
kiṃsu chetvā na socati,
kissa'ssu ekadhammassa,
vadhaṃ rocesi gotamā'ti.

data.meaning_combo: having injured; (comm) having beaten; lit. having cut
data.example_1:
dadanti h'eke visame niviṭṭhā,
chetvā vadhitvā atha socayitvā,
sā dakkhiṇā assumukhā sadaṇḍā,
samena dinnassa na aggham'eti.

data.meaning_1: having cut up; having sliced up
data.meaning_combo: having cut up; having sliced up; lit. having cut
data.example_1: so taṃ thūṇaṃ khaṇḍ'ākhaṇḍikaṃ chindeyya. khaṇḍ'ākhaṇḍikaṃ chetvā phāleyya. phāletvā sakalikaṃ sakalikaṃ kareyya. sakalikaṃ sakalikaṃ katvā vāt'ātape visoseyya. vāt'ātape visosetvā agginā ḍaheyya.
data.example_2: so yā tā sālalaṭṭhiyo kuṭilā oj'āpaharaṇiyo tā chetvā bahiddhā nīhareyya, antovanaṃ suvisodhitaṃ visodheyya. yā pana tā sālalaṭṭhiyo ujukā sujātā tā sammā parihareyya.

data.meaning_1: (of a stream) having cut across; having breasted; having forded
data.meaning_combo: (of a stream) having cut across; having breasted; having forded; lit. having cut
data.example_1: so paṭhamaṃ patāresi ye te usabhā gopitaro gopariṇāyakā. te tiriyaṃ gaṅgāya sotaṃ chetvā sotthinā pāraṃ agamaṃsu. ath'āpare patāresi balavagāvo dammagāvo.
seyyathā'pi, bhikkhave, puriso yaṃ imasmiṃ jambudīpe tiṇakaṭṭhasākhāpalāsaṃ tacchetvā ekajjhaṃ saṃhareyya, ekajjhaṃ saṃharitvā sūlaṃ kareyya
data.example_2: sākhāpalāsaṃ suvisodhitaṃ visodhetvā kuṭhārīhi taccheyya, kuṭhārīhi tacchetvā vāsīhi taccheyya, vāsīhi tacchetvā lekhaṇiyā likheyya, lekhaṇiyā likhitvā pāsāṇaguḷena dhoveyya, pāsāṇaguḷena dhovetvā nadiṃ patāreyya.

data.meaning_1: many; much; lots; a lot (of); great; large
data.meaning_combo: many; much; lots; a lot (of); great; large
data.example_1: katamañ'ca, gahapati, ānaṇyasukhaṃ? idha, gahapati, kulaputto na kassaci kiñci dhāreti appaṃ vā bahuṃ vā.
data.example_2: dvīhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato bālo abyatto asappuriso khataṃ upahataṃ attānaṃ pariharati sāvajjo ca hoti sānuvajjo ca viññūnaṃ bahuñ'ca apuññaṃ pasavati

data.meaning_1: many; much; lots; a lot (of); great; large
data.meaning_combo: many; much; lots; a lot (of); great; large

data.meaning_1: many people; many things; much; a lot
data.example_1:
taṃ buddhaṃ asitaṃ tādiṃ,
akuhaṃ gaṇim'āgataṃ,
bahūnam'idha baddhānaṃ,
atthi pañhena āgamaṃ.

data.grammar: ind, adv, acc sg of ekadhā
data.meaning_1: together; in one place; in the same place
data.example_1: evañ'ca pana, bhikkhave, vūpasametabbaṃ. sabbeh'eva ekajjhaṃ sannipatitabbaṃ, sannipatitvā byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo.
data.example_2: seyyathā'pi, bhikkhave, puriso yaṃ imasmiṃ jambudīpe tiṇakaṭṭhasākhāpalāsaṃ tacchetvā ekajjhaṃ saṃhareyya, ekajjhaṃ saṃharitvā sūlaṃ kareyya

data.example_1: seyyathā'pi, bhikkhave, puriso yaṃ imasmiṃ jambudīpe tiṇakaṭṭhasākhāpalāsaṃ tacchetvā ekajjhaṃ saṃhareyya, ekajjhaṃ saṃharitvā sūlaṃ kareyya
data.example_2: upāsakā bhikkhunisaṅghassa cīvar'atthāya chandakaṃ saṃharitvā, aññatarassa pāvārikassa ghare parikkhāraṃ nikkhipitvā, bhikkhuniyo upasaṅkamitvā etadavocuṃ

data.meaning_combo: having folded; having tucked in; lit. having carried together
data.example_1: puna caparaṃ, bhikkhave, idh'ekacco assakhaḷuṅko, pehī'ti vutto, viddho samāno codito sārathinā purime ca pāde saṃharitvā pacchime ca pāde saṃharitvā tatth'eva cattāro pāde abhinisīdati.

data.meaning_combo: (of hands) having put together; lit. having carried together

data.meaning_1: measuring four inches; four fingerbreadths long
data.meaning_combo: measuring four inches; four fingerbreadths long
data.example_1: seyyathā'pi, bhikkhave, puriso yaṃ imasmiṃ jambudīpe tiṇakaṭṭhasākhāpalāsaṃ taṃ chetvā ekajjhaṃ saṃharitvā caturaṅgulaṃ caturaṅgulaṃ ghaṭikaṃ katvā nikkhipeyya
data.example_2:
vuṭṭhamhi deve caturaṅgule tiṇe,
saṃpupphite meghanibhamhi kānane,
nag'antare viṭapisamo sayissaṃ,
taṃ me mudū hehiti tūlasannibhaṃ.

components.example_1: evam'eva kho, bhikkhave, yv'āyaṃ jhāyī samādhismiṃ samādhikusalo ca hoti samādhismiṃ samāpattikusalo ca ayaṃ imesaṃ catunnaṃ jhāyīnaṃ aggo ca seṭṭho ca mokkho ca uttamo ca pavaro cā'ti.
components.example_2: katamañ'ca, bhikkhave, rūpaṃ? cattāro ca mahābhūtā, catunnañ'ca mahābhūtānaṃ upādāya rūpaṃ. idaṃ vuccati, bhikkhave, rūpaṃ.

components.meaning_1: measure of length; inch; finger breadth
components.example_1: navaṃ pana bhikkhunā mañcaṃ vā pīṭhaṃ vā kārayamānena aṭṭh'aṅgulapādakaṃ kāretabbaṃ sugat'aṅgulena aññatra heṭṭhimāya aṭaniyā. taṃ atikkāmayato chedanakaṃ pācittiyaṃ.
components.example_2:
vuṭṭhamhi deve caturaṅgule tiṇe,
saṃpupphite meghanibhamhi kānane,
nag'antare viṭapisamo sayissaṃ,
taṃ me mudū hehiti tūlasannibhaṃ.

components.example_1:
yaṃ taṃ isīhi pattabbaṃ,
ṭhānaṃ durabhisambhavaṃ,
na taṃ dv'aṅgulapaññāya,
sakkā pappotum'itthiyā.

components.example_2: katamañ'ca, bhikkhave, rūpaṃ? cattāro ca mahābhūtā, catunnañ'ca mahābhūtānaṃ upādāya rūpaṃ. idaṃ vuccati, bhikkhave, rūpaṃ.

components.meaning_1: measure of length; inch; finger breadth
components.example_1: navaṃ pana bhikkhunā mañcaṃ vā pīṭhaṃ vā kārayamānena aṭṭh'aṅgulapādakaṃ kāretabbaṃ sugat'aṅgulena aññatra heṭṭhimāya aṭaniyā. taṃ atikkāmayato chedanakaṃ pācittiyaṃ.
components.example_2:
vuṭṭhamhi deve caturaṅgule tiṇe,
saṃpupphite meghanibhamhi kānane,
nag'antare viṭapisamo sayissaṃ,
taṃ me mudū hehiti tūlasannibhaṃ.

components.example_1:
yaṃ taṃ isīhi pattabbaṃ,
ṭhānaṃ durabhisambhavaṃ,
na taṃ dv'aṅgulapaññāya,
sakkā pappotum'itthiyā.

data.example_1: seyyathā'pi, bhikkhave, puriso yaṃ imasmiṃ jambudīpe tiṇakaṭṭhasākhāpalāsaṃ taṃ chetvā ekajjhaṃ saṃharitvā caturaṅgulaṃ caturaṅgulaṃ ghaṭikaṃ katvā nikkhipeyya
data.example_2:
tiṇa-kaṭṭha-sākhā-palāsaṃ,
upanītaṃ anamataggato sara,
caturaṅgulikā ghaṭikā,
pitupitusv'eva nappahonti.

data.example_1: sa kho so, bhikkhave, kumāro vuddhim'anvāya indriyānaṃ paripākam'anvāya yāni tāni kumārakānaṃ kīḷāpanakāni tehi kīḷati, seyyath'idaṃ, vaṅkakaṃ ghaṭikaṃ mokkhacikaṃ ciṅgulakaṃ patt'āḷhakaṃ rathakaṃ dhanukaṃ.

bhikkhāya ca vicarantaṃ,

na taṃ kammaṃ kataṃ sādhu,
yaṃ katvā anutappati,
yassa assumukho rodaṃ,
vipākaṃ paṭisevati.
data.example_2: katvā'pi te, rāhula, kāyena kammaṃ tadeva te kāyakammaṃ paccavekkhitabbaṃ, yaṃ nu kho ahaṃ idaṃ kāyena kammaṃ akāsiṃ idaṃ me kāyakammaṃ attabyābādhāya'pi saṃvattati

data.example_1: so taṃ thūṇaṃ khaṇḍ'ākhaṇḍikaṃ chindeyya. khaṇḍ'ākhaṇḍikaṃ chetvā phāleyya. phāletvā sakalikaṃ sakalikaṃ kareyya. sakalikaṃ sakalikaṃ katvā vāt'ātape visoseyya. vāt'ātape visosetvā agginā ḍaheyya.
data.example_2: idha, bhikkhave, rañño nāgo yam'enaṃ hatthidammasārathi kāraṇaṃ kāreti, yadi vā katapubbaṃ yadi vā akatapubbaṃ, taṃ aṭṭhiṃ katvā manasi katvā sabbaṃ cetasā samannāharitvā ohitasoto suṇāti.

data.example_1: na kho pan'āhaṃ, sāriputta, ettāvatā saupavajjo'ti vadāmi. yo kho, sāriputta, tañ'ca kāyaṃ nikkhipati, aññañ'ca kāyaṃ upādiyati, tam'ahaṃ saupavajjo'ti vadāmi.
data.example_2: seyyathā'pi, rāhula, pathaviyā sucim'pi nikkhipanti, asucim'pi nikkhipanti, gūthagatam'pi nikkhipanti, muttagatam'pi nikkhipanti, kheḷagatam'pi nikkhipanti, pubbagatam'pi nikkhipanti, lohitagatam'pi nikkhipanti, na ca tena pathavī aṭṭīyati vā harāyati vā jigucchati vā.

data.example_1: so imam'eva kāyaṃ vivekajena pītisukhena abhisandeti parisandeti paripūreti parippharati n'āssa kiñci sabbāvato kāyassa vivekajena pītisukhena apphuṭaṃ hoti
data.example_2: itthaṃ sudaṃ bhagavā āyasmantaṃ rāhulaṃ imāhi gāthāhi abhiṇhaṃ ovadatī'ti

components.meaning_1: not used up; not exhausted; not consumed; not run out
components.meaning_combo: not used up; not exhausted; not consumed; not run out; lit. not taken all around
components.example_1: ayaṃ me mātā, tassā me mātu ayaṃ mātā'ti, apariyādinnā'va bhikkhave, tassa purisassa mātumātaro assu, atha imasmiṃ jambudīpe tiṇakaṭṭhasākhāpalāsaṃ parikkhayaṃ pariyādānaṃ gaccheyya.
components.example_2: yāvakīvañ'ca me, sāriputta, sakaṃ muttakarīsaṃ apariyādinnaṃ hoti, sakaṃ'y'eva sudaṃ muttakarīsaṃ āhāremi. idaṃsu me, sāriputta, mahāvikaṭabhojanasmiṃ hoti.

components.meaning_1: not overwhelmed; not overpowered; not under the control of
components.meaning_combo: not overwhelmed; not overpowered; not under the control of; lit. not taken all around
components.example_1: yadapi aluddho lobhena anabhibhūto apariyādinnacitto na parassa asatā dukkhaṃ uppādayati, vadhena vā bandhanena vā jāniyā vā garahāya vā pabbājanāya vā balav'amhi bal'attho iti'pi tadapi kusalaṃ.
components.example_2: aluddho pan'āyaṃ, kālāmā, purisapuggalo lobhena anabhibhūto apariyādinnacitto n'eva pāṇaṃ hanati

components.example_1:
yo n'ājjhagamā bhavesu sāraṃ,
vicinaṃ puppham'iva udumbaresu,
so bhikkhu jahāti orapāraṃ,
urago jiṇṇam'iva tacaṃ purāṇaṃ.
components.example_2:
abalā naṃ balīyanti,
maddant'enaṃ parissayā,
tato naṃ dukkham'anveti,
nāvaṃ bhinnam'iv'odakaṃ.

components.example_1: ayaṃ me mātā, tassā me mātu ayaṃ mātā'ti, apariyādinnā'va bhikkhave, tassa purisassa mātumātaro assu, atha imasmiṃ jambudīpe tiṇakaṭṭhasākhāpalāsaṃ parikkhayaṃ pariyādānaṃ gaccheyya.
components.example_2: yāvakīvañ'ca me, sāriputta, sakaṃ muttakarīsaṃ apariyādinnaṃ hoti, sakaṃ'y'eva sudaṃ muttakarīsaṃ āhāremi. idaṃsu me, sāriputta, mahāvikaṭabhojanasmiṃ hoti.

components.meaning_1: not overwhelmed; not overpowered; not under the control of
components.meaning_combo: not overwhelmed; not overpowered; not under the control of; lit. not taken all around
components.example_1: yadapi aluddho lobhena anabhibhūto apariyādinnacitto na parassa asatā dukkhaṃ uppādayati, vadhena vā bandhanena vā jāniyā vā garahāya vā pabbājanāya vā balav'amhi bal'attho iti'pi tadapi kusalaṃ.
components.example_2: aluddho pan'āyaṃ, kālāmā, purisapuggalo lobhena anabhibhūto apariyādinnacitto n'eva pāṇaṃ hanati

components.example_1:
gutte yadatthaṃ pabbajjā,
hitvā puttaṃ vasuṃ piyaṃ,
tam'eva anubrūhehi,
mā cittassa vasaṃ gami.
siyā kho pana te, nigrodha, evam'assa, antevāsikamyatā no samaṇo gotamo evam'āhā'ti. na kho pan'etaṃ, nigrodha, evaṃ daṭṭhabbaṃ. yo eva vo ācariyo, so eva vo ācariyo hotu.
components.example_2: evam'eva kho, bhikkhave, tassa ce bhikkhuno tesam'pi vitakkānaṃ ādīnavaṃ upaparikkhato uppajjant'eva pāpakā akusalā vitakkā chand'ūpasaṃhitā'pi dos'ūpasaṃhitā'pi moh'ūpasaṃhitā'pi, te pahīyanti te abbhatthaṃ gacchanti.

components.example_1: mettaṃ manokammaṃ paccupaṭṭhitaṃ hoti sabrahmacārīsu āvi c'eva raho ca.
components.example_2: tassa kho pāpakā samācārā dissanti c'eva suyyanti ca kulāni ca tena duṭṭhāni dissanti c'eva suyyanti ca

components.example_1: te brahmānañ'c'eva abbhācikkhanti, musā ca bhāsanti, bahuñ'ca apuññaṃ pasavanti.
puṇṇo theraṃ disvā'va kasiṃ ṭhapetvā pañcapatiṭṭhitena theraṃ vanditvā, dantakaṭṭhena attho bhavissatī'ti dantakaṭṭhaṃ kappiyaṃ katvā adāsi

components.example_1:
yo n'ājjhagamā bhavesu sāraṃ,
vicinaṃ puppham'iva udumbaresu,
so bhikkhu jahāti orapāraṃ,
urago jiṇṇam'iva tacaṃ purāṇaṃ.
components.example_2:
abalā naṃ balīyanti,
maddant'enaṃ parissayā,
tato naṃ dukkham'anveti,
nāvaṃ bhinnam'iv'odakaṃ.

data.meaning_1: therefore; thus; so; because of that; regarding that
data.meaning_combo: therefore; thus; so; because of that; regarding that; lit. of that
data.example_1: tassa te, āvuso, alābhā, tassa te dulladdhaṃ, yaṃ tvaṃ pātimokkhe uddissamānena na sādhukaṃ aṭṭhiṃ katvā manasi karosī'ti, idaṃ tasmiṃ mohanake pācittiyaṃ.
data.example_2: tassa me tumhe puttā orasā mukhato jātā dhammajā dhammanimmitā dhammadāy'ādā, no āmisadāy'ādā.

data.example_1: yo, bhikkhave, evaṃ vadeyya, yathā yath'āyaṃ puriso kammaṃ karoti tathā tathā taṃ paṭisaṃvediyatī'ti, evaṃ santaṃ, bhikkhave, brahmacariyavāso na hoti, okāso na paññāyati sammā dukkhassa antakiriyāya.
data.example_2:
supinena yathā'pi saṅgataṃ,
paṭibuddho puriso na passati,
evam'pi piyāyitaṃ janaṃ,
petaṃ kālakataṃ na passati.

sā tattha rajjati tatr'ābhiramati. sā tattha rattā tatr'ābhiratā bahiddhā puris'indriyaṃ manasi karoti, purisakuttaṃ puris'ākappaṃ purisavidhaṃ purisacchandaṃ purisassaraṃ puris'ālaṅ'kāraṃ. sā tattha rajjati tatr'ābhiramati.
data.example_2: yathā yathā kho te, vāseṭṭha, sattā akaṭṭhapākaṃ sāliṃ paribhuñjantā taṃbhakkhā tadāhārā ciraṃ dīgham'addhānaṃ aṭṭhaṃsu, tathā tathā tesaṃ sattānaṃ bhiyyosomattāya kharattañ'c'eva kāyasmiṃ okkami, vaṇṇavevaṇṇatā ca paññāyittha, itthiyā ca itthiliṅgaṃ pāturahosi purisassa ca purisaliṅgaṃ.

data.meaning_1: may be; could be; should be; would be; could become
data.example_1: seyyathā'pi, sunakkhatta, puriso sakamhā gāmā vā nigamā vā ciravippavuttho assa.
data.example_2:
parassa ce vambhayitena hīno,
na koci dhammesu visesi assa,
puthū hi aññassa vadanti dhammaṃ,
nihīnato sam'hi daḷhaṃ vadānā.

data.example_1: assosi kho bhagavā dibbāya sotadhātuyā visuddhāya atikkantamānusikāya bhāradvājagottassa brāhmaṇassa māgaṇḍiyena paribbājakena saddhiṃ imaṃ kathāsallāpaṃ.
data.example_2: assosi kho sunakkhatto licchaviputto, sambahulehi kira bhikkhūhi bhagavato santike aññā byākatā hoti

data.example_1: atthi imasmiṃ kāye… pittaṃ semhaṃ pubbo lohitaṃ sedo medo, assu vasā kheḷo siṅghāṇikā lasikā muttan'ti.
data.example_2: yaṃ ajjhattaṃ paccattaṃ āpo āpogataṃ upādinnaṃ, seyyath'idaṃ… assu vasā kheḷo siṅghāṇikā lasikā muttaṃ… ayaṃ vuccati, rāhula, ajjhattikā āpodhātu.

data.example_1: atthi imasmiṃ kāye… pittaṃ semhaṃ pubbo lohitaṃ sedo medo, assu vasā kheḷo siṅghāṇikā lasikā muttan'ti.

data.example_1: evam'assu-ayaṃ apaṇṇako dhammo dussamatto samādinno, ek'aṃsaṃ pharitvā tiṭṭhati, riñcati kusalaṃ ṭhānaṃ.

data.meaning_1: then; also; and so; after that
data.example_1:
sabbe saṅkhārā aniccā'ti,
yadā paññāya passati,
atha nibbindati dukkhe,
esa maggo visuddhiyā.
data.example_2: yadā kho, bhikkhave, kummo kacchapo soṇḍipañcamānaṃ aṅgānaṃ aññataraṃ vā aññataraṃ vā aṅgaṃ na abhininnāmi, atha siṅgālo kummamhā nibbijja pakkāmi, otāraṃ alabhamāno.

data.example_1:
appakā te manussesu,
ye janā pāragāmino,
atha-ayaṃ itarā pajā,
tīram'ev'ānudhāvati.
data.example_2:
atha pāpāni kammāni,
karaṃ bālo na bujjhati,
sehi kammehi dummedho,
aggidaḍḍho'va tappati.

data.example_1: so imam'eva kāyaṃ vivekajena pītisukhena abhisandeti parisandeti paripūreti parippharati n'āssa kiñci sabbāvato kāyassa vivekajena pītisukhena apphuṭaṃ hoti
data.example_2: itthaṃ sudaṃ bhagavā āyasmantaṃ rāhulaṃ imāhi gāthāhi abhiṇhaṃ ovadatī'ti

data.compound_construction: tiṇa ca kaṭṭha ca sākhā ca palāsa ca
data.example_1: seyyathā'pi, bhikkhave, puriso yaṃ imasmiṃ jambudīpe tiṇakaṭṭhasākhāpalāsaṃ tacchetvā ekajjhaṃ saṃhareyya, ekajjhaṃ saṃharitvā sūlaṃ kareyya
data.example_2: yaṃnūn'āhaṃ tiṇakaṭṭhasākhāpalāsaṃ saṃkaḍḍhitvā, kullaṃ bandhitvā, taṃ kullaṃ nissāya hatthehi ca pādehi ca vāyamamāno sotthinā pāraṃ uttareyyan'ti.

components.example_1: tassā evam'assa, yaṃnūn'āhaṃ agatapubbañ'c'eva disaṃ gaccheyyaṃ, akhāditapubbāni ca tiṇāni khādeyyaṃ, apītapubbāni ca pānīyāni piveyyan'ti.
components.example_2: so tattha allāni c'eva tiṇāni pakkhipeyya, allāni ca gomayāni pakkhipeyya, allāni ca kaṭṭhāni pakkhipeyya, udakavātañ'ca dadeyya, paṃsukena ca okireyya.

components.example_1:
tiṇadosāni khettāni,
rāgadosā ayaṃ pajā,
tasmā hi vītarāgesu,
dinnaṃ hoti mahapphalaṃ.
evaṃ vutte, mahārāja, te bhikkhū maṃ etadavocuṃ, n'atthi kho, bhante, ghaṭikārassa kumbhakārassa nivesane tiṇaṃ, atthi ca khv'āssa āvesane tiṇacchadanan'ti.

kadā nu kaṭṭhe ca tiṇe latā ca,
khandhe ime'haṃ amite ca dhamme,
ajjhattikān'eva ca bāhirāni ca,
samaṃ tuleyyaṃ tadidaṃ kadā me.
components.example_2: yadā kho, āvuso, imaṃ kāyaṃ tayo dhammā jahanti, āyu usmā ca viññāṇaṃ, ath'āyaṃ kāyo ujjhito avakkhitto seti, yathā kaṭṭhaṃ acetanan'ti.

components.meaning_combo: ploughed; tilled; farmed; cultivated; lit. dragged
components.example_1:
evamesā kasī kaṭṭhā,
sā hoti amatapphalā,
etaṃ kasiṃ kasitvāna,
sabbadukkhā pamuccatī'ti.
seyyathā'pi bhikkhave makkaṭo araññe pavane caramāno sākhaṃ gaṇhati taṃ muñcitvā aññaṃ gaṇhati taṃ muñcitvā aññaṃ gaṇhati
components.example_2:
purimaṃ pahāya aparaṃ sitāse,
ej'ānugā te na taranti saṅgaṃ,
te uggahāyanti nirassajanti,
kapī'va sākhaṃ pamuñcaṃ gahāyaṃ.

components.example_1: pabbatakandarapadarasākhāparipūrā kusobbhe paripūrenti, kusobbhā paripūrā mahāsobbhe paripūrenti, mahāsobbhā paripūrā, kunnadiyo paripūrenti, kunnadiyo paripūrā mahānadiyo paripūrenti, mahānadiyo paripūrā mahāsamuddaṃ paripūrenti
components.example_2: seyyathā'pi, bhikkhave, uparipabbate thullaphusitake deve vassante taṃ udakaṃ yathāninnaṃ pavattamānaṃ pabbatakandarapadarasākhā paripūreti.

components.example_1:
tagarañ'ca palāsena,
yo naro upanayhati,
pattā'pi surabhi vāyanti,
evaṃ dhīr'ūpasevanā.
components.example_2: seyyathā'pi, sunakkhatta, paṇḍupalāso bandhanā pavutto abhabbo haritattāya, evam'eva kho, sunakkhatta, āneñj'ādhimuttassa purisapuggalassa ye lok'āmisasaṃyojane se pavutte.

components.example_1: evaṃ me sutaṃ, ekaṃ samayaṃ bhagavā kosalesu viharati naḷakapāne palāsavane.
makkhassa ca pahānāya palāsassa ca pahānāya, atthi majjhimā paṭipadā cakkhukaraṇī ñāṇakaraṇī upasamāya abhiññāya sambodhāya nibbānāya saṃvattati
components.example_2: upanāhassa samitattā santo, makkhassa samitattā santo, palāsassa samitattā santo

data.meaning_1: monk; monastic; mendicant; fully ordained monk
data.example_1:
kāmesu n'ābhigijjheyya,
manas'ānāvilo siyā,
kusalo sabbadhammānaṃ,
sato bhikkhu paribbaje'ti.
data.example_2: idam'avoca bhagavā. attamanā te bhikkhū bhagavato bhāsitaṃ abhinandun'ti.

data.meaning_1: wandering on; moving on continuously; transmigration; passing from one state of existence to another; stream of existence; cyclic existence
data.example_1:
anekajātisaṃsāraṃ,
sandhāvissaṃ anibbisaṃ,
gahakārakaṃ gavesanto,
dukkhā jāti punappunaṃ.
data.example_2:
te yogayuttā mārassa,
ayogakkhemino janā,
sattā gacchanti saṃsāraṃ,
jātimaraṇagāmino.

data.meaning_combo: going back and forth; lit. flowing together

data.example_1: yo so, sāriputta, ariyasāvako tathāgate ek'antagato abhippasanno, na so tathāgate vā tathāgatasāsane vā kaṅkheyya vā vicikiccheyya vā'ti?

data.meaning_1: is clearly known; is evident; is perceived; there is
data.example_1: tīṇ'imāni, bhikkhave, saṅkhatassa saṅkhatalakkhaṇāni. katamāni tīṇi? uppādo paññāyati, vayo paññāyati, ṭhitassa aññathattaṃ paññāyati. imāni kho, bhikkhave, tīṇi saṅkhatassa saṅkhatalakkhaṇānī'ti.
data.example_2: yo, bhikkhave, evaṃ vadeyya, yathā yath'āyaṃ puriso kammaṃ karoti tathā tathā taṃ paṭisaṃvediyatī'ti, evaṃ santaṃ, bhikkhave, brahmacariyavāso na hoti, okāso na paññāyati sammā dukkhassa antakiriyāya.

data.meaning_1: is allowed; is permitted (to); is known
data.meaning_combo: is allowed; is permitted (to); is known; lit. is actively known
data.example_1: maraṇamattañ'h'etaṃ, bhikkhave, dukkhaṃ yadidaṃ aññataraṃ saṃkiliṭṭhaṃ āpattiṃ āpajjati. yathārūpāya āpattiyā vuṭṭhānaṃ paññāyati.
data.example_2: dhammatā esā, bhikkhave, diṭṭhisampannassa puggalassa, kiñ'c'āpi tathārūpiṃ āpattiṃ āpajjati, yathārūpāya āpattiyā vuṭṭhānaṃ paññāyati, atha kho naṃ khippam'eva satthari vā viññūsu vā sabrahmacārīsu deseti vivarati uttānīkaroti, desetvā vivaritvā uttānīkatvā āyatiṃ saṃvaraṃ āpajjati.

data.meaning_combo: is well known; is recognized (by); lit. is actively known
data.example_1: paññāyissasi kho tvaṃ, moghapurisa, etena sakena pāpakena diṭṭhigatena. idh'āhaṃ bhikkhū paṭipucchissāmī'ti.
data.example_2: tassa mayhaṃ, bhante, etadahosi, alaṃ dāni me aḍḍakaraṇena, bhadramukho dāni aḍḍakaraṇena paññāyissatī'ti.

data.meaning_combo: happens (to); occurs (to); exists (for); lit. is actively known
data.example_1: tatra sudaṃ, bhikkhave, vipassī kumāro antepuraṃ gato dukkhī dummano pajjhāyati, dhi'r'atthu kira, bho, jāti nāma, yatra hi nāma jātassa jarā paññāyissatī'ti!

data.meaning_1: impeded by ignorance; obstructed by not understanding
data.meaning_combo: impeded by ignorance; obstructed by not understanding
data.example_1: iti kho, ānanda, kammaṃ khettaṃ, viññāṇaṃ bījaṃ, taṇhā sneho. avijjānīvaraṇānaṃ sattānaṃ taṇhāsaṃyojanānaṃ hīnāya dhātuyā viññāṇaṃ patiṭṭhitaṃ evaṃ āyatiṃ punabbhav'ābhinibbatti hoti.
data.example_2: pubbā koṭi na paññāyati avijjānīvaraṇānaṃ sattānaṃ taṇhāsaṃyojanānaṃ sandhāvataṃ saṃsarataṃ.

components.meaning_1: ignorance; illusion; not knowing; not understanding
components.meaning_combo: ignorance; illusion; not knowing; not understanding
components.example_1: rūparāgo, arūparāgo, māno, uddhaccaṃ, avijjā, imāni pañc'uddham'bhāgiyāni saṃyojanāni.
components.example_2:
avijjāya nivuto loko,
vevicchā pamādā nappakāsati,
japp'ābhilepanaṃ brūmi,
dukkham'assa mahabbhayaṃ.

components.meaning_combo: obstacle; obstruction; barrier; hindrance; lit. blocking; covering
components.example_1: ko c'āhāro avijjāya? pañca nīvaraṇā'ti'ssa vacanīyaṃ. pañca'p'āhaṃ, bhikkhave, nīvaraṇe sāhāre vadāmi, no anāhāre
components.example_2:
yo nīvaraṇe pahāya pañca,
anigho tiṇṇakathaṃkatho visallo,
so bhikkhu jahāti orapāraṃ,
urago jiṇṇam'iva tacaṃ purāṇaṃ.

components.meaning_combo: obstacle; obstruction; barrier; hindrance; lit. blocking
components.example_1: katame pañca dhammā pahātabbā? pañca nīvaraṇāni, kāmacchandanīvaraṇaṃ, byāpādanīvaraṇaṃ, thinamiddhanīvaraṇaṃ, uddhaccakukuccanīvaraṇaṃ, vicikicchānīvaraṇaṃ. ime pañca dhammā pahātabbā.

components.example_1: rūparāgo, arūparāgo, māno, uddhaccaṃ, avijjā, imāni pañc'uddham'bhāgiyāni saṃyojanāni.
components.example_2:
avijjāya nivuto loko,
vevicchā pamādā nappakāsati,
japp'ābhilepanaṃ brūmi,
dukkham'assa mahabbhayaṃ.

components.meaning_combo: obstacle; obstruction; barrier; hindrance; lit. blocking; covering
components.example_1: ko c'āhāro avijjāya? pañca nīvaraṇā'ti'ssa vacanīyaṃ. pañca'p'āhaṃ, bhikkhave, nīvaraṇe sāhāre vadāmi, no anāhāre
components.example_2:
yo nīvaraṇe pahāya pañca,
anigho tiṇṇakathaṃkatho visallo,
so bhikkhu jahāti orapāraṃ,
urago jiṇṇam'iva tacaṃ purāṇaṃ.

components.meaning_combo: obstacle; obstruction; barrier; hindrance; lit. blocking
components.example_1: katame pañca dhammā pahātabbā? pañca nīvaraṇāni, kāmacchandanīvaraṇaṃ, byāpādanīvaraṇaṃ, thinamiddhanīvaraṇaṃ, uddhaccakukuccanīvaraṇaṃ, vicikicchānīvaraṇaṃ. ime pañca dhammā pahātabbā.

data.meaning_1: obstacle that is ignorance; obstruction of not understanding
data.meaning_combo: obstacle that is ignorance; obstruction of not understanding
data.example_1: n'āhaṃ, bhikkhave, aññaṃ ekanīvaraṇam'pi samanupassāmi yena nīvaraṇena nivutā pajā dīgharattaṃ sandhāvanti saṃsaranti yatha'y'idaṃ, bhikkhave, avijjānīvaraṇaṃ.

data.example_1:
anicce niccasaññino,
dukkhe ca sukhasaññino,
anattani ca attā'ti,
asubhe subhasaññino,
micchādiṭṭhihatā sattā,
khittacittā visaññino.
data.example_2: evam'eva kho, bhikkhave, appakā te sattā ye manussesu paccājāyanti. atha kho ete'y'eva bahutarā sattā ye aññatra manussehi paccājāyanti.

data.example_1:
anicce niccasaññino,
dukkhe ca sukhasaññino,
anattani ca attā'ti,
asubhe subhasaññino,
micchādiṭṭhihatā sattā,
khittacittā visaññino.
data.example_2: evam'eva kho, bhikkhave, appakā te sattā ye manussesu paccājāyanti. atha kho ete'y'eva bahutarā sattā ye aññatra manussehi paccājāyanti.

data.example_1:
hitvā icchañ'ca lobhañ'ca,
yattha satto puthujjano,
cakkhumā paṭipajjeyya,
tareyya narakaṃ imaṃ.
data.example_2:
satto guhāyaṃ bahun'ābhichanno,
tiṭṭhaṃ naro mohanasmiṃ pagāḷho,
dūre vivekā hi tathāvidho so,
kāmā hi loke na hi suppahāyā.

data.example_1:
akkhambhiyo hoti agāram'āvasaṃ,
par'ābhibhū sattubhi nappamaddano,
manussabhūten'idha hoti kenaci,
akkhambhiyo tassa phalena kammuno.
data.example_2:
idaṃ kho'haṃ tadāvocaṃ,
gahitā tena sattunā,
na me idaṃ tathā dukkhaṃ,
yaṃ maṃ khādeyya rakkhaso,
yañ'ca me ayyaputtassa,
mano hessati aññathā.

data.example_1:
akkhambhiyo hoti agāram'āvasaṃ,
par'ābhibhū sattubhi nappamaddano,
manussabhūten'idha hoti kenaci,
akkhambhiyo tassa phalena kammuno.
data.example_2:
idaṃ kho'haṃ tadāvocaṃ,

yaṃ maṃ khādeyya rakkhaso,

mano hessati aññathā.

data.meaning_1: with craving as fetter; having desire as a bond
data.meaning_combo: with craving as fetter; having desire as a bond
data.example_1: iti kho, ānanda, kammaṃ khettaṃ, viññāṇaṃ bījaṃ, taṇhā sneho. avijjānīvaraṇānaṃ sattānaṃ taṇhāsaṃyojanānaṃ hīnāya dhātuyā viññāṇaṃ patiṭṭhitaṃ evaṃ āyatiṃ punabbhav'ābhinibbatti hoti.
data.example_2: pubbā koṭi na paññāyati avijjānīvaraṇānaṃ sattānaṃ taṇhāsaṃyojanānaṃ sandhāvataṃ saṃsarataṃ.

components.meaning_combo: with craving; having desire (for); lit. with thirst
components.example_1:
rājā ca aññe ca bahū manussā,
avītataṇhā maraṇaṃ upenti,
ūnā'va hutvāna jahanti dehaṃ,
kāmehi lokamhi na h'atthi titti.
components.example_2:
passāmi loke pariphandamānaṃ,
pajaṃ imaṃ taṇhagataṃ bhavesu,
hīnā narā maccumukhe lapanti,
avītataṇhāse bhav'ābhavesu.

components.example_1:
nandisaṃyojano loko,
vitakkassa vicāraṇaṃ,
taṇhāya vippahānena,
nibbānaṃ iti vuccati.
components.example_2: evaṃ vutte aññataro bhikkhu there bhikkhū etadavoca, phasso kho, āvuso, eko anto, phassasamudayo dutiyo anto, phassanirodho majjhe, taṇhā sibbinī.

components.example_1: bālo puttataṇhāya c'eva dhanataṇhāya ca haññati vihaññati dukkhayati

components.meaning_1: name of one of the three daughters of Death
components.meaning_combo: name of one of the three daughters of Death; lit. thirst
components.example_1:
disvāna taṇhaṃ aratiṃ ragañ'ca,
n'āhosi chando api methunasmiṃ,
kim'ev'idaṃ muttakarīsapuṇṇaṃ,
pādā'pi naṃ samphusituṃ na icche.
components.example_2: atha kho taṇhā ca arati ca ragā ca māradhītaro yena māro pāpimā ten'upasaṅkamiṃsu.

components.example_1:
ito ahaṃ vassasatāni pañca,
yaṃ evarūpā vicarāmi naggā,
khudāya taṇhāya ca khajjamānā,
pāpassa kammassa phalaṃ mam'edaṃ.

components.meaning_1: fetter; chain; bond; thing which binds
components.meaning_combo: fetter; chain; bond; thing which binds; lit. causing to yoke together
components.example_1:
appamādarato bhikkhu,
pamāde bhayadassi vā,
saṃyojanaṃ aṇuṃ thūlaṃ,
ḍahaṃ aggī'va gacchati.
components.example_2: evam'eva kho, bhikkhave, bhāvan'ānuyogaṃ anuyuttassa bhikkhuno viharato appakasiren'eva saṃyojanāni paṭippassambhanti pūtikāni bhavantī'ti.

components.meaning_combo: connection; link; lit. causing to yoke together
components.example_1: seyyathā'pi, sunakkhatta, paṇḍupalāso bandhanā pavutto abhabbo haritattāya. evam'eva kho, sunakkhatta, āneñj'ādhimuttassa purisapuggalassa ye lok'āmisasaṃyojane se pavutte.

components.meaning_1: with a fetter; having a chain; about a bond; regarding a thing which binds
components.meaning_combo: with a fetter; having a chain; about a bond; regarding a thing which binds; lit. causing to yoke together
components.example_1: kittāvatā pana, bho gotama, bhikkhu arahaṃ hoti khīṇ'āsavo vusitavā katakaraṇīyo ohitabhāro anuppattasadattho parikkhīṇabhavasaṃyojano samma'd'aññā vimutto'ti?

data.example_1: iti kho, ānanda, kammaṃ khettaṃ, viññāṇaṃ bījaṃ, taṇhā sneho. avijjānīvaraṇānaṃ sattānaṃ taṇhāsaṃyojanānaṃ hīnāya dhātuyā viññāṇaṃ patiṭṭhitaṃ evaṃ āyatiṃ punabbhav'ābhinibbatti hoti.
data.example_2: pubbā koṭi na paññāyati avijjānīvaraṇānaṃ sattānaṃ taṇhāsaṃyojanānaṃ sandhāvataṃ saṃsarataṃ.

components.meaning_combo: with craving; having desire (for); lit. with thirst
components.example_1:
rājā ca aññe ca bahū manussā,
avītataṇhā maraṇaṃ upenti,
ūnā'va hutvāna jahanti dehaṃ,
kāmehi lokamhi na h'atthi titti.
components.example_2:
passāmi loke pariphandamānaṃ,
pajaṃ imaṃ taṇhagataṃ bhavesu,
hīnā narā maccumukhe lapanti,
avītataṇhāse bhav'ābhavesu.

components.example_1:
nandisaṃyojano loko,
vitakkassa vicāraṇaṃ,
taṇhāya vippahānena,
nibbānaṃ iti vuccati.
components.example_2: evaṃ vutte aññataro bhikkhu there bhikkhū etadavoca, phasso kho, āvuso, eko anto, phassasamudayo dutiyo anto, phassanirodho majjhe, taṇhā sibbinī.

components.example_1: bālo puttataṇhāya c'eva dhanataṇhāya ca haññati vihaññati dukkhayati

components.meaning_1: name of one of the three daughters of Death
components.meaning_combo: name of one of the three daughters of Death; lit. thirst
components.example_1:
disvāna taṇhaṃ aratiṃ ragañ'ca,
n'āhosi chando api methunasmiṃ,
kim'ev'idaṃ muttakarīsapuṇṇaṃ,
pādā'pi naṃ samphusituṃ na icche.
components.example_2: atha kho taṇhā ca arati ca ragā ca māradhītaro yena māro pāpimā ten'upasaṅkamiṃsu.

components.example_1:
ito ahaṃ vassasatāni pañca,
yaṃ evarūpā vicarāmi naggā,
khudāya taṇhāya ca khajjamānā,
pāpassa kammassa phalaṃ mam'edaṃ.

components.meaning_1: fetter; chain; bond; thing which binds
components.meaning_combo: fetter; chain; bond; thing which binds; lit. causing to yoke together
components.example_1:
appamādarato bhikkhu,
pamāde bhayadassi vā,
saṃyojanaṃ aṇuṃ thūlaṃ,
ḍahaṃ aggī'va gacchati.
components.example_2: evam'eva kho, bhikkhave, bhāvan'ānuyogaṃ anuyuttassa bhikkhuno viharato appakasiren'eva saṃyojanāni paṭippassambhanti pūtikāni bhavantī'ti.

components.meaning_combo: connection; link; lit. causing to yoke together
components.example_1: seyyathā'pi, sunakkhatta, paṇḍupalāso bandhanā pavutto abhabbo haritattāya. evam'eva kho, sunakkhatta, āneñj'ādhimuttassa purisapuggalassa ye lok'āmisasaṃyojane se pavutte.

components.meaning_1: with a fetter; having a chain; about a bond; regarding a thing which binds

data.meaning_combo: wanders on; travels; transmigrates (to); lit. flows together
data.example_1: na kho pana so, sāriputta, saṃsāro sulabharūpo yo mayā asaṃsaritapubbo iminā dīghena addhunā, aññatra suddh'āvāsehi devehi. suddh'āvāse c'āhaṃ, sāriputta, deve saṃsareyyaṃ, na'y'imaṃ lokaṃ punarāgaccheyyaṃ.
data.example_2: tena kho pana samayena sātissa nāma bhikkhuno kevaṭṭaputtassa evarūpaṃ pāpakaṃ diṭṭhigataṃ uppannaṃ hoti, tath'āhaṃ bhagavatā dhammaṃ desitaṃ ājānāmi yathā tadev'idaṃ viññāṇaṃ sandhāvati saṃsarati anaññan'ti.

data.meaning_1: thus; this; like this; similarly; in the same manner; just as; such
data.example_1: evaṃ me sutaṃ, ekaṃ samayaṃ bhagavā ukkaṭṭhāyaṃ viharati subhagavane sālarājamūle. tatra kho bhagavā bhikkhū āmantesi, bhikkhavo'ti.
data.example_2:
accī yathā vātavegena khittā,
atthaṃ paleti na upeti saṅkhaṃ,
evaṃ munī nāmakāyā vimutto,
atthaṃ paleti na upeti saṅkhaṃ.

data.example_1: nanu te, bhikkhave, yāva'd'eva kantārassa nittharaṇ'atthāya āhāraṃ āhāreyyun'ti? evaṃ, bhante
data.example_2: bhabbo nu kho so puriso parittaṃ aggiṃ ujjālitun'ti? evaṃ, bhante.

data.example_1:
ātume itthibhūtāya,
dīgharattāya mārisa,
yassā me itthibhūtāya,
saṃsāre bahubhāsasī'ti.

components.meaning_1: long (in space or time); tall; deep
components.example_1:
dīghā jāgarato ratti,
dīghaṃ santassa yojanaṃ,
dīgho bālānaṃ saṃsāro,
saddhammaṃ avijānataṃ.
components.example_2: hoti kho so, bhikkhave, samayo yaṃ kadāci karahaci dīghassa addhuno accayena tassa mahānirayassa puratthimaṃ dvāraṃ apāpurīyati.

components.example_1: atha kho dīgho parajano yakkho yena bhagavā ten'upasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṃ abhivādetvā ekam'antaṃ aṭṭhāsi.
components.example_2:
gopālo supparodho ca,
hiri netti ca mandiyo,
pañcālacaṇḍo āḷavako,
pajjunno sumano sumukho,
dadhimukho maṇi māṇivaro dīgho,
atho serīsako saha.

components.example_1: siyā ca tassa bhikkhuno koci'd'eva paccayo tena cīvarena vippavāsāya, chārattaparamaṃ tena bhikkhunā tena cīvarena vippavasitabbaṃ. tato ce uttari vippavaseyya aññatra bhikkhusammutiyā, nissaggiyaṃ pācittiyaṃ.
components.example_2: yo pana bhikkhu anupasampannena uttaridirattatirattaṃ sahaseyyaṃ kappeyya, pācittiyaṃ.

components.example_1: te upakaṭṭhāya vass'ūpanāyikāya pañcasatatāpase himavantato āgantvā nagare bhikkhāya carante disvā pasīditvā nisīdāpetvā bhojetvā paṭiññaṃ gahetvā cattāro māse attano santike vasāpetvā puna vassāratte āgaman'atthāya paṭijānāpetvā uyyojesuṃ.
tam'enaṃ rajako yasmiṃ yasmiṃ raṅgajāte upasaṃhareyya, yadi nīlakāya yadi pītakāya yadi lohitakāya yadi mañjiṭṭhakāya, surattavaṇṇam'ev'assa parisuddhavaṇṇam'ev'assa.
components.example_2: dhovā'ti āṇāpeti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. dhotāni nissaggiyāni honti. rajā'ti āṇāpeti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. rattāni nissaggiyāni honti. vijaṭehī'ti āṇāpeti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. vijaṭitāni nissaggiyāni honti.

components.example_1: sabbanaṅgalāni saddhiṃ balibaddarasmiyottehi jāṇussoṇissa ratho viya rajataparikkhittāni honti. rañño ālambananaṅgalaṃ rattasuvaṇṇaparikkhittaṃ hoti.

nimittaggāho kumbhīlasadiso sabbam'eva gaṇhāti, anubyañjanaggāho rattapāsadiso vibhajitvā hatthapād'ādīsu taṃ taṃ koṭṭhāsaṃ. ime pana dve gāhā ekajavanavāre'pi labbhanti, nānājavanavāre vattabbam'eva n'atthi.
vipariṇatan'ti rattam'pi cittaṃ vipariṇataṃ. duṭṭham'pi cittaṃ vipariṇataṃ. mūḷham'pi cittaṃ vipariṇataṃ. apica, rattaṃ cittaṃ imasmiṃ atthe adhippetaṃ vipariṇatan'ti.
components.example_2:
evaṃ pamatto rasagārave ratto,
bālo yadī āyati n'āvabujjhati,
vidhamma putte caji ñātake ca,
parivattiya attānam'eva khādati.

components.meaning_1: who is infatuated; who is enamoured; who is inflamed (with)
components.meaning_combo: who is infatuated; who is enamoured; who is inflamed (with)

components.example_1: siyā ca tassa bhikkhuno koci'd'eva paccayo tena cīvarena vippavāsāya, chārattaparamaṃ tena bhikkhunā tena cīvarena vippavasitabbaṃ. tato ce uttari vippavaseyya aññatra bhikkhusammutiyā, nissaggiyaṃ pācittiyaṃ.

components.example_1: te upakaṭṭhāya vass'ūpanāyikāya pañcasatatāpase himavantato āgantvā nagare bhikkhāya carante disvā pasīditvā nisīdāpetvā bhojetvā paṭiññaṃ gahetvā cattāro māse attano santike vasāpetvā puna vassāratte āgaman'atthāya paṭijānāpetvā uyyojesuṃ.
tam'enaṃ rajako yasmiṃ yasmiṃ raṅgajāte upasaṃhareyya, yadi nīlakāya yadi pītakāya yadi lohitakāya yadi mañjiṭṭhakāya, surattavaṇṇam'ev'assa parisuddhavaṇṇam'ev'assa.

components.example_1: sabbanaṅgalāni saddhiṃ balibaddarasmiyottehi jāṇussoṇissa ratho viya rajataparikkhittāni honti. rañño ālambananaṅgalaṃ rattasuvaṇṇaparikkhittaṃ hoti.

nimittaggāho kumbhīlasadiso sabbam'eva gaṇhāti, anubyañjanaggāho rattapāsadiso vibhajitvā hatthapād'ādīsu taṃ taṃ koṭṭhāsaṃ. ime pana dve gāhā ekajavanavāre'pi labbhanti, nānājavanavāre vattabbam'eva n'atthi.

components.example_2:

data.grammar: ind, adv, acc sg of dukkha
data.example_1:
jayaṃ veraṃ pasavati,
dukkhaṃ seti parājito,
upasanto sukhaṃ seti,
hitvā jayaparājayaṃ.
data.example_2: kodhano'yaṃ, bhikkhave, purisapuggalo kodh'ābhibhūto kodhapareto, kiñ'c'āpi so pallaṅke seti gonak'atthate paṭalik'atthate kadalimigapavarapaccattharaṇe sauttaracchade ubhato-lohitak'ūpadhāne, atha kho so dukkhaññ'eva seti kodh'ābhibhūto.

data.meaning_1: personally experienced; suffered; undergone; met with (by)
data.example_1: evaṃ dīgharattaṃ vo, bhikkhave, dukkhaṃ paccanubhūtaṃ tibbaṃ paccanubhūtaṃ byasanaṃ paccanubhūtaṃ, kaṭasī vaḍḍhitā.
data.example_2: mā, bhikkhave, puññānaṃ bhāyittha. sukhass'etaṃ, bhikkhave, adhivacanaṃ yadidaṃ puññāni. abhijānāmi kho pan'āhaṃ, bhikkhave, dīgharattaṃ katānaṃ puññānaṃ dīgharattaṃ iṭṭhaṃ kantaṃ manāpaṃ vipākaṃ paccanubhūtaṃ.

data.example_1: tasmā't'iha, bhikkhave, evaṃ sikkhitabbaṃ, tibbo no chando bhavissati adhisīlasikkhāsamādāne, tibbo no chando bhavissati adhicittasikkhāsamādāne, tibbo no chando bhavissati adhipaññāsikkhāsamādāne'ti.

data.example_1: evaṃ dīgharattaṃ vo, bhikkhave, dukkhaṃ paccanubhūtaṃ tibbaṃ paccanubhūtaṃ byasanaṃ paccanubhūtaṃ, kaṭasī vaḍḍhitā.
evaṃ dīgharattaṃ vo, bhikkhave, dukkhaṃ paccanubhūtaṃ tibbaṃ paccanubhūtaṃ byasanaṃ paccanubhūtaṃ, kaṭasī vaḍḍhitā.
evaṃ dīgharattaṃ vo, bhikkhave, dukkhaṃ paccanubhūtaṃ tibbaṃ paccanubhūtaṃ byasanaṃ paccanubhūtaṃ, kaṭasī vaḍḍhitā.
seyyathā'pi, gahapati, gāmassa vā nigamassa vā avidūre tibbo vanasaṇḍo. tatr'assa rukkho sampannaphalo ca upapannaphalo ca, na c'assu kānici phalāni bhūmiyaṃ patitāni.
data.example_2: kāḷapakkho ca uposatho hoti. tibbo ca vanasaṇḍo hoti. mahā ca kāḷamegho abbhuṭṭhito hoti. evarūpe'pi caturaṅgasamannāgate andhakāre samantā yojanaṃ passati.

data.example_1:
na mandiyā sayāmi n'āpi kāveyyamatto,
atthaṃ samecc'āham'apetasoko,
eko vivitte sayan'āsanamhi,
sayām'ahaṃ sabbabhūt'ānukampī.
data.example_2: so sayati evaṃ maṃ sayantaṃ n'ābhijjhādomanassā pāpakā akusalā dhammā anvāssavissantī'ti

components.meaning_1: here; in this place; in this case; in this regard
components.example_1: sādhu bhikkhu ettha ca te bhikkhu cakkhu n'etaṃ mama n'eso'ham'asmi na m'eso attā'ti
components.example_2:
yam'etaṃ pañhaṃ apucchi,
ajita taṃ vadāmi te,
yattha nāmañ'ca rūpañ'ca,
asesaṃ uparujjhati,
viññāṇassa nirodhena,
etth'etaṃ uparujjhati.

components.meaning_1: thus; like this; this is; and so
components.example_1: iti kho, bhikkhave, na'y'idaṃ brahmacariyaṃ lābhasakkārasilok'ānisaṃsaṃ na sīlasampad'ānisaṃsaṃ na samādhisampad'ānisaṃsaṃ na ñāṇadassan'ānisaṃsaṃ
components.example_2:
akiñcanaṃ anādānaṃ,
etaṃ dīpaṃ anāparaṃ,
nibbānaṃ iti naṃ brūmi,
jarāmaccuparikkhayaṃ.

data.example_1: evaṃ dīgharattaṃ vo, bhikkhave, dukkhaṃ paccanubhūtaṃ tibbaṃ paccanubhūtaṃ byasanaṃ paccanubhūtaṃ, kaṭasī vaḍḍhitā.
data.example_2:
bhutvāna bheke khalamūsikāyo,
kaṭasīsu khittāni ca koṇapāni,
mahāvane suññavane vivaḍḍho,
amaññi kotthu migarāj'āham'asmi.

data.example_1: yāvañ'c'idaṃ, bhikkhave, alam'eva sabbasaṅkhāresu nibbindituṃ alaṃ virajjituṃ alaṃ vimuccitun'ti.
data.example_2: n'āhaṃ, bhikkhave, aññaṃ ekadhammam'pi samanupassāmi yaṃ evaṃ lahuparivattaṃ yatha'y'idaṃ cittaṃ. yāvañ'c'idaṃ, bhikkhave, upamā'pi na sukarā yāva lahuparivattaṃ cittan'ti.

components.example_2: abhabbo taṃ kammaṃ kātuṃ, yaṃ kammaṃ katvā nirayaṃ vā tiracchānayoniṃ vā pettivisayaṃ vā upapajjeyya, abhabbo'va tāva kālaṃ kātuṃ yāva na sot'āpattiphalaṃ sacchikaroti.

components.meaning_combo: 6th item in a numerical list; lit. letter c

components.example_1:
gutte yadatthaṃ pabbajjā,
hitvā puttaṃ vasuṃ piyaṃ,
tam'eva anubrūhehi,
mā cittassa vasaṃ gami.
siyā kho pana te, nigrodha, evam'assa, antevāsikamyatā no samaṇo gotamo evam'āhā'ti. na kho pan'etaṃ, nigrodha, evaṃ daṭṭhabbaṃ. yo eva vo ācariyo, so eva vo ācariyo hotu.
components.example_2: evam'eva kho, bhikkhave, tassa ce bhikkhuno tesam'pi vitakkānaṃ ādīnavaṃ upaparikkhato uppajjant'eva pāpakā akusalā vitakkā chand'ūpasaṃhitā'pi dos'ūpasaṃhitā'pi moh'ūpasaṃhitā'pi, te pahīyanti te abbhatthaṃ gacchanti.

components.example_1: mettaṃ manokammaṃ paccupaṭṭhitaṃ hoti sabrahmacārīsu āvi c'eva raho ca.
components.example_2: tassa kho pāpakā samācārā dissanti c'eva suyyanti ca kulāni ca tena duṭṭhāni dissanti c'eva suyyanti ca

components.example_1: te brahmānañ'c'eva abbhācikkhanti, musā ca bhāsanti, bahuñ'ca apuññaṃ pasavanti.

data.meaning_1: all activities; all processes; all conditions; all fabrications; all formations
data.example_1: sabbasaṅkhārā ca me anavatthitā khāyissanti, sabbaloke ca me mano n'ābhiramissati, sabbalokā ca me mano vuṭṭhahissati
data.example_2: etaṃ santaṃ etaṃ paṇītaṃ yadidaṃ sabbasaṅkhārasamatho sabb'ūpadhipaṭinissaggo taṇhākkhayo virāgo nirodho nibbānan'ti

components.example_1:
sabbe saṅkhārā aniccā'ti,
yadā paññāya passati,
atha nibbindati dukkhe,
esa maggo visuddhiyā.
components.example_2:
atthaṅ'gatassa na pamāṇam'atthi,
yena naṃ vajjuṃ taṃ tassa n'atthi,
sabbesu dhammesu samohatesu,
samūhatā vādapathā'pi sabbe'ti.

components.example_1: sabbehi me piyehi manāpehi nānābhāvo vinābhāvo'ti pabbajitena abhiṇhaṃ paccavekkhitabbaṃ
components.example_2: ekam'antaṃ nisinnā kho therā bhikkhū yāvatako ahosi sabbeh'eva saddhiṃ kathāsallāpo, taṃ sabbaṃ bhagavato ārocesuṃ.

components.example_1: alaṃ, moggallāna, mā te rucci sabbassa bhikkhusaṅghassa uttarakuruṃ piṇḍāya gamanan'ti.

components.meaning_1: intention; volitional formation; choice; karmic activity
components.meaning_combo: intention; volitional formation; choice; karmic activity; lit. making together
components.example_1: avijjāpaccayā saṅkhārā, saṅkhārapaccayā viññāṇaṃ, viññāṇapaccayā nāmarūpaṃ
components.example_2: te jātisaṃvattanikesu saṅkhāresu abhiramanti, jarāsaṃvattanikesu saṅkhāresu abhiramanti, maraṇasaṃvattanikesu saṅkhāresu abhiramanti, soka-parideva-dukkha-domanass'upāyāsa-saṃvattanikesu saṅkhāresu abhiramanti.

components.meaning_combo: function; activity; process; lit. making together
components.example_1: passambhayaṃ kāyasaṅkhāraṃ assasissāmī'ti sikkhati, passambhayaṃ kāyasaṅkhāraṃ passasissāmī'ti sikkhati.
components.example_2: yv'āyaṃ, āvuso, mato kālaṅ'kato tassa kāyasaṅkhārā niruddhā paṭippassaddhā, vacīsaṅkhārā niruddhā paṭippassaddhā, cittasaṅkhārā niruddhā paṭippassaddhā, āyu parikkhīṇo, usmā vūpasantā, indriyāni paribhinnāni.

components.meaning_1: mental formation; mental activity; thought processes; fourth of the five aggregates
components.meaning_combo: mental formation; mental activity; thought processes; fourth of the five aggregates; lit. making together
components.example_1: saṅkhārā ca h'idaṃ, bhikkhave, attā abhavissaṃsu, na'y'idaṃ saṅkhārā ābādhāya saṃvatteyyuṃ, labbhetha ca saṅkhāresu, evaṃ me saṅkhārā hontu, evaṃ me saṅkhārā mā ahesun'ti.
components.example_2: so phasso anicco'ti passati, vedanā aniccā'ti passati, saññā aniccā'ti passati, saṅkhārā aniccā'ti passati, viññāṇaṃ aniccan'ti passati. tassa dhāt'ārammaṇam'eva cittaṃ pakkhandati pasīdati santiṭṭhati adhimuccati.

components.meaning_1: condition; conditioned thing; construction; fabrication; concoction
components.example_1:
sabbe saṅkhārā aniccā'ti,
yadā paññāya passati,
atha nibbindati dukkhe,
esa maggo visuddhiyā.
components.example_2: atha kho bhagavā bhikkhū āmantesi, handa dāni, bhikkhave, āmantayāmi vo, vayadhammā saṅkhārā appamādena sampādethā'ti. ayaṃ tathāgatassa pacchimā vācā.

components.meaning_1: having intention; with volition; having mental activity
components.meaning_combo: having intention; with volition; having mental activity; lit. making together

components.meaning_combo: constituency; construction; condition; state; lit. making together
components.example_1: so evaṃ vicuṇṇitamakkhito taṅ'khaṇaññ'eva antarahita-vaṇṇa-gandha-saṅkhāra-viseso suvānadoṇiyaṃ ṭhitasuvānavamathu viya paramajegucchabhāvaṃ upagacchati. evarūpo'pi samāno cakkhussa āpāthaṃ atītattā ajjhoharitabbo hotī'ti evaṃ paribhogato paṭikkūlatā paccavekkhitabbā.

data.example_1: sace te, bhaggava, agaru viharemu āvesane ekarattan'ti. na kho me, bhante, garu. atthi c'ettha pabbajito paṭhamaṃ vās'ūpagato. sace so anujānāti, viharatha, bhante, yathāsukhan'ti.
data.example_2: etāni pañca kammāni, chand'āharaṇ'ādīni pātimokkh'uddesato paṭhamaṃ kattabbatā, uposathassa uposathakammassa pubbakiccan'ti vuccati.

verse_text: anamataggo'yaṃ [anamataggāyaṃ] bhikkhave, saṃsāro. pubbā koṭi na paññāyati avijjānīvaraṇānaṃ sattānaṃ taṇhāsaṃyojanānaṃ sandhāvataṃ saṃsarataṃ. seyyathā'pi, bhikkhave, puriso yaṃ imasmiṃ jambudīpe tiṇakaṭṭhasākhāpalāsaṃ taṃ chetvā [tacchetvā (bahūsu)] ekajjhaṃ saṃharitvā caturaṅgulaṃ caturaṅgulaṃ ghaṭikaṃ katvā nikkhipeyya, ayaṃ me mātā, tassā me mātu ayaṃ mātā'ti, apariyādinnā'va [apariyādiṇṇā'va] bhikkhave, tassa purisassa mātumātaro assu, atha imasmiṃ jambudīpe tiṇakaṭṭhasākhāpalāsaṃ parikkhayaṃ pariyādānaṃ gaccheyya. taṃ kissa hetu? anamataggo'yaṃ, bhikkhave, saṃsāro. pubbā koṭi na paññāyati avijjānīvaraṇānaṃ sattānaṃ taṇhāsaṃyojanānaṃ sandhāvataṃ saṃsarataṃ. evaṃ dīgharattaṃ vo, bhikkhave, dukkhaṃ paccanubhūtaṃ tibbaṃ paccanubhūtaṃ byasanaṃ paccanubhūtaṃ, kaṭasī [kaṭasi kaṭā chavā sayan'ti etthā'ti kaṭasī] vaḍḍhitā. yāvañ'c'idaṃ, bhikkhave, alam'eva sabbasaṅkhāresu nibbindituṃ alaṃ virajjituṃ alaṃ vimuccitun'ti. paṭhamaṃ.
